message: No new failures to report. The 2 CI pipeline failures on the current HEAD commit (981f081b) — `js - computelimit - mgmt (Build Analyze)` and `js - openai (Build Build)` — are the same infrastructure-related failures (stale Ubuntu-24.04 1ES image, 48 days old) already tracked in open issue #38297 filed on 2026-04-27. No code regressions or new unit test failures were detected. The known-failures list in #37864 remains empty.
